case_title: ORRIN HARRIS VS. B.B. HAWK INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ORRIN HARRIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BB HAWK INC. IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY BENJAMIN LIN. DEFENDANT HAWK BB LLC IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY BENJAMIN LIN. DEFENDANT BENJAMIN LIN IS PRESENT. DENFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CASE SETTLED PURSUANT TO AGREEMENT. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,200.00 FILED BY HARRIS, ORRIN AS TO DEFENDANT B.B. HAWK INC. LIN, BENNIE AKA BENJAMIN LIN DBA B.B. HAWK HAWK BB, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, ORRIN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HAWK BB, LLC
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/3/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
